x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: License ownership data enables Now Assist SAM to route AI-generated optimization recommendations and reclamation tasks to the correct stakeholders. Without ownership, AI insights are generated but cannot be acted upon by the right people.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaTotal.addQuery("active", true); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No active license records found", finding: "No active license records. License ownership cannot be assessed." }; } var gaOwned = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaOwned.addQuery("active", true); gaOwned.addEncodedQuery("owned_byISNOTEMPTY^ORmanaged_byISNOTEMPTY^ORassigned_toISNOTEMPTY"); gaOwned.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaOwned.query(); var withOwner = gaOwned.next() ? parseInt(gaOwned.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withOwner / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of active licenses have an owner/manager (" + withOwner + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI reclamation and optimization recommendations can be routed to the correct license owners." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have ownership assigned (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may not reach the correct stakeholders." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be routed without license ownership data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Assign owners, managers, or responsible parties to all active license records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses and populate the Owned By, Managed By, or Assigned To fields.
